get.description: Lists all the available Domain Services operations.
Lists all the available OuContainer operations.
The List Domain Services in Subscription operation lists all the domain services available under the given subscription (and across all resource groups within that subscription).

get.summary: List Domain Services in Resource Group
get.description: The List Domain Services in Resource Group operation lists all the domain services available under the given resource group.
The Get Domain Service operation retrieves a json representation of the Domain Service.

parameters.name: domainServiceName
parameters.description: The name of the domain service.

put.summary: Create or Update Domain Service (PUT Resource)
put.description: The Create Domain Service operation creates a new domain service with the specified parameters. If the specific service already exists, then any patchable properties will be updated and any immutable properties will remain unchanged.

parameters.name: domainServiceName
parameters.description: The name of the domain service.

parameters.name: domainService
parameters.description: Properties supplied to the Create or Update a Domain Service operation.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

202.description: The request has been accepted for processing, but processing has not yet completed.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

CloudError.description: An error response from the Domain Services.

error.description: An error response from the Domain Services.

CloudErrorBody.description: An error response from the Domain Services.

code.description: An identifier for the error. Codes are invariant and are intended to be consumed programmatically.

message.description: A message describing the error, intended to be suitable for display in a user interface.

target.description: The target of the particular error. For example, the name of the property in error.

details.description: A list of additional details about the error.

validatorResults.description: List of Configuration Diagnostics validator results.

replicaSetSubnetDisplayName.description: Replica set location and subnet name

status.description: Status for individual validator after running diagnostics.

issues.description: List of resource config validation issues.

ConfigDiagnosticsValidatorResultIssue.description: Specific issue for a particular config diagnostics validator

descriptionParams.description: List of domain resource property name or values used to compose a rich description.

ntlmV1.description: A flag to determine whether or not NtlmV1 is enabled or disabled.

tlsV1.description: A flag to determine whether or not TlsV1 is enabled or disabled.

syncNtlmPasswords.description: A flag to determine whether or not SyncNtlmPasswords is enabled or disabled.

syncKerberosPasswords.description: A flag to determine whether or not SyncKerberosPasswords is enabled or disabled.

syncOnPremPasswords.description: A flag to determine whether or not SyncOnPremPasswords is enabled or disabled.

kerberosRc4Encryption.description: A flag to determine whether or not KerberosRc4Encryption is enabled or disabled.

kerberosArmoring.description: A flag to determine whether or not KerberosArmoring is enabled or disabled.

ldapSigning.description: A flag to determine whether or not LdapSigning is enabled or disabled.

channelBinding.description: A flag to determine whether or not ChannelBinding is enabled or disabled.

syncOnPremSamAccountName.description: A flag to determine whether the SyncOnPremSamAccountName feature is active. When enabled, the samAccountName attribute in Entra Domain Services is synchronized from the onPremisesSamAccountName attribute in Entra ID

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

nextLink.description: The continuation token for the next page of results.

domainName.description: The name of the Azure domain that the user would like to deploy Domain Services to.

syncApplicationId.description: The unique sync application id of the Azure AD Domain Services deployment.

filteredSync.description: Enabled or Disabled flag to turn on Group-based filtered sync

syncScope.description: All or CloudOnly, All users in AAD are synced to AAD DS domain or only users actively syncing in the cloud

provisioningState.description: the current deployment or provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

configDiagnostics.description: Configuration diagnostics data containing latest execution from client.

FilteredSync.description: Enabled or Disabled flag to turn on Group-based filtered sync

ldaps.description: A flag to determine whether or not Secure LDAP is enabled or disabled.

pfxCertificate.description: The certificate required to configure Secure LDAP. The parameter passed here should be a base64encoded representation of the certificate pfx file.

pfxCertificatePassword.description: The password to decrypt the provided Secure LDAP certificate pfx file.

publicCertificate.description: Public certificate used to configure secure ldap.

certificateNotAfter.description: NotAfter DateTime of configure ldaps certificate.

externalAccess.description: A flag to determine whether or not Secure LDAP access over the internet is enabled or disabled.

notifyDcAdmins.description: Should domain controller admins be notified

NotifyDcAdmins.description: Should domain controller admins be notified

OperationDisplayInfo.description: The operation supported by Domain Services.

operation.description: The action that users can perform, based on their permission level.

resource.description: Resource on which the operation is performed.

OperationEntity.description: The operation supported by Domain Services.

display.description: The operation supported by Domain Services.

OperationEntityListResult.description: The list of domain service operation response.

nextLink.description: The continuation token for the next page of results.

location.description: The geo-location where the resource lives

OuContainerListResult.description: The list of OuContainers in DomainService instance.

nextLink.description: The continuation token for the next page of results.

domainName.description: The domain name of Domain Services.

provisioningState.description: The current deployment or provisioning state, which only appears in the response.

subnetId.description: The name of the virtual network that Domain Services will be deployed on. The id of the subnet that Domain Services will be deployed on. /virtualNetwork/vnetName/subnets/subnetName.

domainControllerIpAddress.description: List of Domain Controller IP Address

selfUnsuspendCounter.description: Number of times the customer has self-resumed the domain service. Valid values range from 0 to 5, where 5 is the maximum allowed count before further self-resume is denied and support intervention is required.

settings.description: List of settings for Resource Forest

UnsuspendDomainServiceResponse.description: Response for successful unsuspend of a domain service.
